title: A thirsty ghost
question: 把今天的“证据 + 过去推断 + 另一种解释”放进教室场景：早上进教室，椅子被移动、灯亮着、零食盒空了。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: The chairs had been moved and the lights were on. The snack box was empty. Someone must have come in last night. I suggested that the club members must have had a meeting. Even if it is free, I will not take it.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 用被动语态描述现场证据：椅子被移动了
options.english_template: The chairs ___ and the lights were on.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说明另一个证据：零食盒是空的

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 用 must have done 做过去推断：昨晚一定有人进来过

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 用 suggested that... 提出另一种解释：我暗示社团成员一定开过会
options.english_template: I ___ the club members must have had a meeting.

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 用 even if 表达“即使免费，我也不要”
options.english_template: ___ it is free, I will not take it.
